.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path creation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21, so the compiler must be configured to generate bytecode compatible with Java 21; otherwise, it will compile for Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version to 21 in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21, reinforcing the property change and ensuring correct bytecode generation.
